finding_results.notes: Recast Yaret's threat into seizure, chain-of-custody, and official-record consequences while keeping his low-contraction procedural register. Adjusted Tavi's reply to answer that bureaucratic leverage directly.
finding_results.summary: Yaret now pressures Mira and Tavi with specific evidentiary and liability consequences instead of abstract thematic villain speech.

summary: Applied the dialogue/idiolect/cadence fix by tightening Yaret's raid-scene voice to concrete bureaucratic coercion and preserving scene pressure.
